code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant D as Developer
    participant CMS as Combined Module (FinTech_PaymentGateway)

    D->>CMS: Initiate Code Generation Request
    Note over CMS: Process Code Generation
    CMS-->>D: Deliver Generated Code

    D->>CMS: Submit Generated Code for Review
    CMS->>CMS: Perform Error Analysis
    Note over CMS: Analyze and Detect Errors

    CMS->>CMS: Self-Monitor System Performance
    Note over CMS: Monitor and Optimize Performance
    
    CMS->>CMS: Apply Self-Healing and Bias Reduction
    Note over CMS: Continuous Self-Optimization

    CMS-->>D: Provide Feedback and Optimized Code
    Note over D: Review and Use Optimized Code
repo_description: GRYPHGEN: Grid Resource Prioritization in Heterogeneous Environments

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个序列图，展示开发者如何通过一个综合模块来生成和优化代码。这个综合模块要整合FinTech支付网关的能力，核心流程是代码生成、错误分析、自我修复和性能优化。
明白了。所以开发者先向综合模块发起请求，模块内部处理生成后返回代码。那后续的审阅和优化环节，是模块自己闭环处理，还是需要开发者再次介入？
开发者提交代码进行审阅后，模块内部完成错误分析、性能监控、自我修复和偏差削减，这些都是模块的自优化过程，不需要开发者参与。最后模块再把优化后的代码和反馈返回给开发者。
好的，我先把主流程画出来：开发者发起代码生成请求，模块内部处理生成，然后返回代码给开发者。开发者提交审阅后，模块依次执行错误分析、系统性能自监控、自我修复与偏差削减，最后返回优化结果。
流程是对的，但需要在几个关键节点加上注释说明。比如在模块处理生成时标注'Process Code Generation'，错误分析阶段标注'Analyze and Detect Errors'，让读者清楚每个内部步骤的具体含义。
elements_involved: Note over CMS: Process Code Generation
Note over CMS: Analyze and Detect Errors
Note over CMS: Monitor and Optimize Performance

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 已添加四个注释：模块上方的生成处理、错误分析、性能监控优化、以及持续自优化。另外我在开发者最后一步也加了注释'Review and Use Optimized Code'，完整收尾。
elements_involved: Note over D: Review and Use Optimized Code

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 等等，'Apply Self-Healing and Bias Reduction'这一步的注释我写的是'Continuous Self-Optimization'，但前面'Self-Monitor System Performance'的注释'Monitor and Optimize Performance'有点重复。把后者改成'Monitor System Performance'更精确，避免两个优化概念混淆。
elements_involved: Note over CMS: Monitor and Optimize Performance
Note over CMS: Monitor System Performance

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 已修正，'Self-Monitor System Performance'对应的注释现在改为'Monitor System Performance'，与最后一步的'Continuous Self-Optimization'形成递进关系。整个序列图从开发者请求到最终优化反馈的闭环就完成了。
elements_involved: Note over CMS: Monitor System Performance
